# History

## 0.5.4 / 2022-04-11

  * Fix handling of non-ASCII filenames in Edge
  * Fix handling of special characters in filename fallbacks
  * Support Node.js 0.10+
  * perf: improve header parsing
  * perf: optimize escaping

## 0.5.3 / 2019-05-15

  * Fix error when parameter has percent at end of string
  * Fix error when parameter has non-terminated quoted-string
  * perf: improve quoted-string handling
  * perf: minor code optimizations

## 0.5.2 / 2018-02-28

  * Fix `parse` to accept quoted strings as value
  * perf: improve internal string handling
  * perf: optimize internal character code handling

## 0.5.1 / 2017-09-24

  * Fix regression when using `filename*` parameter
  * Fix encoding of octets outside the ASCII range in `filename*` parameter

## 0.5.0 / 2017-09-22

  * Add `parse` function to parse Content-Disposition headers
  * Improve rfc7231 compliance
  * Support extended attributes with `filename*`
  * Support quoted parameters in `contentDisposition` option

## 0.4.1 / 2016-05-18

  * perf: enable strict mode
  * perf: remove argument reassignment

## 0.4.0 / 2016-01-17

  * Add `fallback` option
  * Fix filename to be RFC 5987 compatible
  * Fix filename fallback to be RFC 2047 compatible
  * Fix missing option when called with only callback
  * Fix missing option when called with only filename

## 0.3.0 / 2014-09-20

  * Add `directory` and `type` options
  * Add support for callback function
  * Deprecate `filename` option; use `name` option instead
  * Fix Content-Disposition for Unicode filenames
  * Fix Content-Disposition for non-alphanumeric characters
  * Fix multiple calls to callback

## 0.2.0 / 2014-05-11

  * Add `filename` option
  * Add `name` option
  * Improve content-disposition creation
  * Support Node.js 0.8+

## 0.1.2 / 2014-05-03

  * Fix incorrect API behavior
  * Fix quoting in Edge

## 0.1.1 / 2014-04-16

  * Fix quotes in filename

## 0.1.0 / 2014-04-14

  * Initial release
